posts.text:
The government shutdown continues to affect TSA workers and people’s travel, as wait times have increased tremendously around the country. If you’re planning on flying in the near future, @mimibrowntv brings you more information on Front Page News! 📰

Video

🚨 @BigXthaPlugg  dives into life outside of music and the different ways he protects himself while navigating industry events.➡️ Check out the full conversation on @breakfastclubam on @netflix.

Video

🥹🙌 Congratulations are in order for “Big Mama” Latto, as she has announced her pregnancy after fans have been speculating for months 🤰🏽! The fans aren’t letting up either and have been comparing tattoo photos in her newly released music video, deeming 21 Savage the father! Tap into the latest w/ @lorenlorosa .

Video

🗣️ @BigXthaPlugg , @BigGeneral274 , @KevanGotBandz , @iamkainemusic, @rosama_ten7, and @YUNGHOODBCE  came through to promote their N.W.A. inspired '6WA' mixtape, out now — but where did the vision come from? ➡️ Check out the full conversation on @breakfastclubam on @netflix 🎬

Video

Senator Rand Paul gets Donkey of the Day for holding a grudge after Senator Mullins told the media that he understood why Paul was attacked by his neighbor during a DHS nomination meeting. Sen. Paul, you’ve got smoke with the wrong person, and we don’t have time for this right now… 🤨 Tap into #DOTD, powered by @msllegal 🐂 #MichaelTheBull #TheBullNYC.

Video

🚨 @rajahcaruth_ shares how he learned to drive for @nascar through simulation but there are some things you can only learn in real-life situations. Tap in to hear how he made the transition.
➡️ Check out the full conversation on @breakfastclubam on @netflix

Video

🚨 Do you prefer not to live with your partner? Well, people these days are more inclined to have their own space while building a future with their partner. Let's discuss ⬇️

Video

🚨Brandy speaks out about the recent rumors circulating online about her alleged dating life in the 90's, and @lorenlorosa has the latest!

Video

🚨 It looks like Remy’s plan to create a film entitled “The Biggest Boss” may not come to fruition, as a cease-and-desist letter has been sent by Rick Ross and @lorenlorosa breaks down why📰

Video

🚨 @rajahcaruth_ came through to promote his upcoming @nascar race at Darlington Raceway this Saturday, March 21st at 5:30 PM ET. He’ll hit the track 🏎️, flossing a @blackeffect-wrapped car! 😮‍💨 ➡️ Check out the full conversation on @breakfastclubam on @netflix.

Video
Should there be a statute of limitations on the bodies you've caught?🤔
Good morning USAAAAAAA! Peace to the planet it’s Thursdayyyy! Tap into the world’s dangerous morning show! Breakfastclubonline.com/list…

🗣️ @rajahcaruth_  will be live on The Breakfast Club  promoting his upcoming  @NASCAR  race at Darlington Raceway on Saturday, March 21st at 5:30 PM ET as @BlackEffectPods  Network will serve as the primary partner👏 ! Set your alarms ⏰ and Listen live Tomorrow and➡️ breakfastclubonline.com/list…

Video

Donkey of the Day goes to Cleveland, OH the city and the MF crew, for not caring about the 70-ton meteor that hit their soil 😳. Y’all are really overstimulated by the world, huh? Y’all just don’t care. Tap into #DOTD, powered by @msllegal 🐂 #MichaelTheBull #TheBullNYC.

Video

Within @anitakopacz’s book series, she breaks down the concept of the 'Sacred Trinity' and how it mirrors  “Holy Trinity” . Tap in as she gives us a snippet of what’s to come as she continues to finish Book Three.
➡️ Check out the full conversation on @breakfastclubam on @netflix.

Video

🚨 Author @anitakopacz’s journey to creating the series 'Daughter of Three Waters' is like no other! Anita explains why the spiritual elements in her storytelling are important and how the stories she’s retelling are very similar to Ryan Coogler’s 'Sinners'. ➡️ Check out the full conversation on @breakfastclubam on @netflix.

Video

🚨 Ray J turns up after he saw the video clip of Shyne and Ma$e talking about their previous connection with Brandy and Ray J DID NOT feel that at all! 😡 @lorenlorosa has the latest updates with @rayj.

Video

🚨 Ray J turns up after he saw the video clip of Shyne and Ma$e talking about their previous connection with Brandy and Ray J DID NOT feel that at all! 😡 @lorenlorosa has the latest updates with @rayj.

Video

🚨 Producer/artist @mikewillmadeit’s hard drive with all his music at the time was part of a smash-and-grab in ATL 😳, but how did he recover from such a loss? ➡️ Check out the full conversation on @breakfastclubam on @netflix.

Video

💕 Claressa Shields drops an R&B love song for her man, her man, her man Papoose! @jesshilarious_official & @cthagod are dropping 💣s for this record! Tap in to the latest with @lorenlorosa.
